builds_on.name: reinforcement learning
builds_on.evidence: we directly scale RL training for deep research with only outcome rewards

builds_on.name: Retrieval-Augmented Generation
builds_on.evidence: current open-source efforts to integrate RL with information retrieval, such as Search-R1, R1-Searcher, and ReSearch, have primarily focused on Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) using static, local text corpora
